subcodes.first_line: O ye who are firm in the Covenant! The friends of 'Ishqabad must strive until no trace of estrangement remains and love prevails [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان یاران عشق آباد باید بکوشند تا اغبرار در میان نماند و محبت
subcodes.subjects: @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @war and peace, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
